summary: Extracted abstract style patterns from reference sample

metadata.toneAlignment: Retained intimacy, selective description, and dry wit from the sample while calibrating toward the story concept's morally complex, atmospherically taut, anti-melodramatic tone.

characterVoiceRequirements.POV1: Support a clipped, tactile, structurally minded voice with shorter default cadence.
characterVoiceRequirements.POV2: Support a more observational, analytically layered voice with greater sentence-length variation and subtext sensitivity.
